{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Damascan captain
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Damascan captain]] recognizes the significance of [[Myria village]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
